Package edu.yu.marketmaker.exchange

package edu.yu.marketmaker.exchange
Gateway for the Market Maker application. This package provides services and utilities for accepting, validating, and dispatching external orders, as well as getting and setting quotes.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    edu.yu.marketmaker
    Root package for the Market Maker application.
